questionHtml:
A student quotes three equations related to atomic and nuclear physics:

I.    E=-13.6n2eV

II.   N=N0e-λt

III.  mvr=nh2π

Which equations refer to the Bohr model for hydrogen?


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: A student quotes three equations related to atomic and nuclear physics: I. E=-13.6n2eV II. N=N0e-λt III. mvr=nh2π Which equations refer to the Bohr model for hydrogen? A. I and II
breadcrumbLabels: 12.1 – The interaction of matter with radiation
